prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年华中科技大学在辽宁物理类最低录取位次分别为约1910名、1793名、1929名、1764名、2108名，整体呈波动走势。2025年位次2108为近五年最高（最 靠后），较2024年1764名后移约344名，存在明显的"大小年"回调压力；该校在辽宁物理类招生计划2021年56人、2022年55人、2023年51人、2024年56人、2025 年51人；2026年计划50人，较2025年小幅缩招1人，缩招幅度约2%，对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中科技大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科 中国大学排名2021–2024年稳居第8名，2025–2026年位列第9名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列，对高分考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价为"偏正面"，主要信号包括 食堂全国排名第一（约35个食堂）、新闻传播学科排名靠前、招生透明度高；抖音热度总排名第22（较热），2021年曾排第2（高热），短视频平台曝光度较高，有助于维持报考 热度；未见明显投档断档记录；拥有A+学科3个（光学工程、机械工程、电气工程）、A学科4个（动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、材料科学与工程、 计算机科学与技术、物理学、管理科学与工程）、A-学科7个（临床医学、公共卫生与预防医学、化学、基础医学、工商管理、新闻传播学、生物医学工程、生物学），共17个A- 及以上学科，工科与医学实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等华科优势专业在2024–2026年持续处于"高 热推荐"或"推荐"状态；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业热度稳定偏热。辽宁省2026年高考总考生约20万人，较2025年（约19.97万）基本持平略增；物理类考生估算约14.3万人 ，与2025年（14.34万）相近，竞争环境稳定。省控线数据2026年缺失，；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在辽宁招生占比约3%–5%（2025 年辽宁招生51人，占全国总招生约5%），属跨省招生，无显著本省偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次后移形成的回调预期、2026年小幅缩招、学校声誉正面、优势专业 热度持续等因素，预计2026年物理类录取位次较2025年有所回升（数字减小），但缩招和考生总数稳定部分抑制回升幅度。预测最低录取位次约2053名，区间1819–2287名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Liaoning's Physics Category were approximately 1910, 1793, 1929, 1764, and 2108 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. The 2025 ranking of 2108 is the highest (most backward) in the past five years, moving back about 344 places compared to 2024's 1764, indicating a clear "big year, small year" correction pressure; the university's enrollment plan in Liaoning's Physics Category was 56 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 51 in 2023, 56 in 2024, and 51 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 50, a slight reduction of 1 person compared to 2025, a reduction of about 2%, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2024, it steadily ranked 8th, and in 2025-2026, it ranked 9th, firmly among the top universities in the country, with sustained appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is "slightly positive," with main signals including the cafeteria ranking first nationwide (about 35 cafeterias), a high ranking in journalism and communication disciplines, and high enrollment transparency; Douyin popularity ranks 22nd overall (relatively hot), and it once ranked 2nd in 2021 (very hot), with high exposure on short video platforms, helping maintain application heat; no obvious enrollment gaps or breaks have been recorded; it has 3 A+ disciplines (Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Physics, Management Science and Engineering), and 7 A- disciplines (Clinical Medicine, Public Health and Preventive Medicine, Chemistry, Basic Medicine, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Biomedical Engineering, Biology), totaling 17 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering and medical strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: HUST's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been in a "highly recommended" or "recommended" state from 2024 to 2026; medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable and slightly hot popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, basically flat with a slight increase compared to 2025 (about 199,700); the estimated number of Physics Category takers is about 143,000, similar to 2025 (143,400), with a stable competitive environment. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with enrollment in Liaoning accounting for about 3%–5% (51 students enrolled in Liaoning in 2025, about 5% of total national enrollment), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without significant local preference advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction expectation from the backward shift in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026, positive school reputation, and sustained popularity of advantageous majors, it is expected that the 2026 Physics Category admission ranking will rebound compared to 2025 (number decreases), but the enrollment reduction and stable total number of test takers partially suppress the rebound. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 2053, with a range of 1819–2287.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 2053, range 1819–2287. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (1819) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Future Technology Experimental Class, Clinical Eight-Year Program, Computer Science); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 2053) are advised to focus on Tier 2 (Electrical Engineering, Automation, Telecommunications) while also sprinting for Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (2287) are advised to focus on Tier 3 (Mathematics, Energy and Power Engineering, Physics) with Tier 2 as sprint targets. Clinical Medicine (General) is in Tier 3 but has an A- discipline evaluation, making it a preferred choice for safety.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985/211/双一流，软科排名全国第9（2026年），顶尖高校层次对历史类考生同样具有品牌吸引力；2026年声誉评价"偏正面"，食堂条件全国领先，整体舆情 积极；抖音热度较热，有助于维持关注度；无投档断档记录；华中科技大学在历史类招生专业为中国语言文学类（汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）、国际商务（英 语辅修学位）、工商管理类（工商管理、会计学、市场营销）。对应学科评估：中国语言文学未单独评级（华科以工医为主），工商管理A-，应用经济学A-（与国际商务相关）， 学科实力中等偏上。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Huazhong University of Science and Technology in Liaoning's History Category were approximately 589, 738, 868, 1055, and 1108, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 519 places over the past 5 years, and an average annual backward shift of about 130 places, indicating a clear downward trend; the enrollment plan for History Category in Liaoning was 4 students in 2021–2022, 6 students in 2023–2025, and 6 students in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985/211/Double First-Class, ranked 9th nationally by Soft Science (2026), the top university level also has brand appeal for History Category candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is 'somewhat positive', with nationally leading cafeteria conditions and overall positive public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively high, helping to maintain attention; no record of admission gaps; the majors enrolled in History Category at Huazhong University of Science and Technology are Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education), International Business (English Minor Degree), and Business Administration (Business Administration, Accounting, Marketing). Corresponding discipline evaluations: Chinese Language and Literature not separately rated (HUST mainly focuses on engineering and medicine), Business Administration A-, Applied Economics A- (related to International Business), with above-average disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of Chinese Language/Chinese majors in 2023–2024 is 'recommended', while Law, Accounting/Finance/Auditing popularity is polarized or relatively hot; the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 57,000, slightly increased from 56,300 in 2025, with a basically stable competitive environment. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing; Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with only 6 students enrolled in History Category in Liaoning, a small proportion, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The continuous backward trend of History Category admission rankings is clear, with the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged, a slight increase in total candidates but limited, a positive school reputation but generally weak appeal of History Category enrollment majors. It is expected that the ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum admission ranking is approximately 1128, with a range of 999–1257.

- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1128, range 999–1257. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (999) can aim for Tier 1 Chinese Language and Literature; those with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 1128) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 International Business; those near the upper limit of the range (1257) are advised to use Tier 3 Business Administration as a safety option. There are only 3 majors in History Category enrollment, with limited choices, so it is recommended to prioritize Chinese Language and Literature based on personal interests and career plans.
